description_long: This is a rounded, white ceramic cup with a smooth, matte finish and a single, sturdy handle attached to one side. The cup features the word 'Ming' printed in a bold, gray font on its exterior, adding a touch of branding or personalization. Its body is thick and slightly bulbous, with a wide, open mouth and a gently curved base, making it stable when placed on flat surfaces. The handle is circular and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior appears hollow and spacious, suitable for holding liquids such as coffee, tea, or water. There are no visible decorative patterns or a lid, and the overall design is minimalist and functional.
description: A white, rounded ceramic cup with a single handle and the word 'Ming' printed on its side. The cup has a smooth, matte finish and a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and the 'Ming' text clearly visible on the cup's surface.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered and the 'Ming' text partially visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cup with the handle on the left and no visible text or decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle or text visible, showing the plain, rounded surface of the cup.
